examples.title: Equivalence Partitioning Example
examples.description: An example of dividing input data into partitions based on equivalence.
examples.code:
IF input >= 0 AND input <= 10 THEN
  partition = 'low'
ELSE IF input > 10 AND input <= 20 THEN
  partition = 'medium'
ELSE
  partition = 'high'
examples.explanation: This pseudocode divides the input data into three partitions based on equivalence.

examples.title: Boundary Value Analysis Example
examples.description: An example of identifying boundaries of input data and testing software's behavior at those boundaries.
examples.explanation: This Java code identifies the boundaries of the input data and tests the software's behavior at those boundaries.
